diagrams.title: Supervised vs Unsupervised Learning Workflow
diagrams.description: Flowchart comparing supervised and unsupervised learning paradigms showing data flow and outputs
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental difference between the two main ML paradigms

diagrams.title: Classification vs Regression
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing discrete categories (classification) vs continuous values (regression) on scatter plots
elements: Left plot: Points in two distinct colored regions (spam/not spam)
Right plot: Points along a trend line showing relationship (house prices)
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between classification and regression problems visually

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Underfitting vs Optimal Model
diagrams.description: Three graphs showing underfitting (straight line), optimal fit (smooth curve), and overfitting (wavy line touching all points)
elements: Underfit: Linear line missing curved pattern
Optimal: Smooth curve capturing true pattern
Overfit: Jagged line passing through every point
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the concept of model complexity and generalization

diagrams.title: K-Means Clustering Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of K-Means algorithm: initialization, assignment, update, convergence
elements: Step 2: Assign each point to nearest centroid (form clusters)
Step 3: Recalculate centroids as cluster means
Step 4: Repeat until centroids stop moving
